app.name: Returnwise
app.one_sentence_promise: Never lose money to missed return windows or forgotten warranties again.
app.target_user: Frequent online and in-store shoppers who buy enough that return deadlines and warranty terms become easy to miss.
app.painful_moment: The user realizes an item is wrong or broken and cannot quickly tell whether they can still return or claim it.
app.why_different: Focuses on deadline leverage and proof readiness, not generic receipt storage or expense tracking.
app.why_users_pay: Directly saves money by surfacing deadlines, documents, and next actions before options expire.
app.subscription_model: Free tier for a small number of tracked purchases; premium for unlimited tracking, smart reminders, warranty folders, and return evidence exports.
app.local_first_mvp_scope: Receipt scan/import, purchase records, deadline calculations, reminder schedules, warranty docs, exportable return packets on-device.
app.future_backend_roadmap: Email receipt sync, merchant integrations, household sharing, optional cross-device sync.
app.ar_ml_llm_fit: ML/OCR is integral for extracting merchant, date, and totals from receipts; no LLM dependency required.
app.design_direction: Sharp, deadline-aware interface with strong calendar cues and clear status labeling.
app.claude_design_prompt: Design a polished iPhone utility that turns receipts into deadline-driven action cards with calm but urgent timeline cues and clean document handling.
app.app_store_positioning: A premium receipt and warranty app built around action, not archiving.
key_risks: OCR quality and correction UX must be strong enough for trust
Could slide toward generic expense tracking if return actions are weak
app.invalidation_criteria: If users still need to manually read every receipt to know what to do, the product isn't differentiated enough.
app.v1_build_scope: Local purchase tracking with receipt scan/import, editable extracted fields, deadline engine, reminder center, exportable proof bundle, onboarding, paywall, tests.
